name: tipcat-phonecases
description: Tip Cat Studios phone case pipeline

prompts.metadata: Analyze this phone case design image and provide structured metadata: title (max 60 characters), teaser, full description highlighting unique elements, exactly 13 tags, category, mood, design highlights (3 items), finish (matte/glossy), colors, and Shopify-formatted HTML description. Return only valid JSON.
prompts.lifestyle_table: A realistic professional product photograph of an iphone tough case using the provided pregenerated mockup attached to place the product on a wooden table, face down, with a cozy cottagecore vibe, lit by sunlight. vertical 4:3 aspect ratio
prompts.lifestyle_hand: realistic iphone tough case product mockup using attached product design image held by a womans hand with acrylic nails in a sunlit scene in pov perspective
